name: Sony WF-1000XM5
tagline: Best overall wireless earbuds for Android and cross-platform
description: Sony's flagship earbuds deliver best-in-class ANC, exceptional LDAC sound quality, and a refined compact design.
longDescription: Sony's WF-1000XM5 builds on the legendary XM4 with improvements in every category. The earbuds are 25% smaller and 20% lighter while packing larger 8.4mm drivers and a new processor. The ANC is the best we have tested — effectively eliminating low-frequency rumble from airplanes and trains while also handling mid-frequency office noise better than ever. Sound quality is exceptional, especially with LDAC-enabled Android devices. The new foam eartips provide better passive isolation and long-term comfort. For anyone not locked into the Apple ecosystem, the XM5 offers the most complete package available.
pros: Exceptional sound quality with LDAC support

keyFeatures.name: Integrated Processor V2
keyFeatures.description: Dual-processor system with Sony's V2 chip and QN2e ANC processor. Real-time noise cancellation optimized to your ear shape and environment.

keyFeatures.name: LDAC Hi-Res Audio
keyFeatures.description: Supports LDAC codec for 3x the data of standard Bluetooth. Near-lossless audio on compatible Android devices. Also supports DSEE Extreme upscaling.

keyFeatures.name: Speak-to-Chat
keyFeatures.description: Automatically pauses music and activates transparency when you start speaking. Resumes playback after conversation ends.

keyFeatures.name: Adaptive Sound Control
keyFeatures.description: Learns your frequent locations and adjusts ANC settings accordingly. Enables ambient sound at office, full ANC during commute.

verdict: The Sony WF-1000XM5 is the best all-around wireless earbud for users who prioritize sound quality and noise cancellation. LDAC support gives it an edge on Android, and the refined design addresses comfort concerns. At $299, it is expensive, but the performance justifies the price.

faqs.question: Is Sony XM5 better than AirPods Pro 2?
faqs.answer: It depends. The XM5 has better ANC (per our measurements), better sound quality with LDAC, and longer battery life. AirPods Pro 2 has better transparency mode, better ecosystem integration for Apple users, and Find My support. For Android users, the XM5 is the clear winner.

faqs.question: Does XM5 support multipoint Bluetooth?
faqs.answer: Yes, WF-1000XM5 supports simultaneous connection to two devices. Switch between phone and laptop seamlessly. Note: LDAC is disabled when multipoint is active — you will be limited to AAC in dual-device mode.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has tested over 100 audio products across 7 years.

seoMeta.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Review 2026: 9.5/10 | TrueTopReviews
